use_cases: Landing page background with animated spark and particle effects
Ambient visual decoration for marketing and promotional pages
Celebratory or decorative effects for special events and launches
ai_summary: A configurable canvas-based particle system that renders falling spark effects with customizable colors, speed, direction, size, and lifetime. The animation runs continuously on an HTML5 canvas and adapts to screen size for use as decorative backgrounds or ambient visual effects on web pages.
